hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'if (.tool_response | type) == "string" then .tool_response else (.tool_response | tostring) end'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then url=$(echo "$output" | grep -o 'https://github.com[^ ]*' | head -1); [ -n "$url" ] && echo "{\"userMessage\": \"PR作成完了: $url\"}"; fi
input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|scss)$'; then prettier --write "$path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then dir=$(dirname "$path"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ -f "$dir/tsconfig.json" ]; then result=$(npx tsc --project "$dir/tsconfig.json" --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5); [ -n "$result" ] && echo "{\"userMessage\": \"TypeScript エラー:\n$result\"}"; fi; fi

input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [ -f "$path" ] && grep -q 'console\.log' "$path"; then count=$(grep -c 'console\.log' "$path"); echo "{\"userMessage\": \"⚠️  console.log が ${count}箇所あります: $(basename $path)\"}"; fi
